instruction: Work Through The Pending Inbox Items.

steps.result_preview:
cat inbox/msg_001.txt
From: Sven de Groot <sven.de.groot@acme-logistics.example.com>
Subject: Could you resend the last invoice?

Hi,

Could you please resend the latest invoice for Acme Robotics? Our finance team needs a copy today.

Thanks,
Sven de Groot
